summary.rationale: The lead-sheet-team now has a clear first storage contract based on one Markdown file per approved song, which preserves inspectability and gives the future Supabase migration an explicit intermediate data shape.

notes: The storage contract remains separate from the development team runtime.
The first publish target is explicit and inspectable.
A per-song Markdown file is easy to diff and review during early ingestion work.
The template makes the publish shape concrete for operators.
This is a contract-definition task, so the strongest signal is structural clarity rather than interface styling.
The Markdown-first step avoids premature database coupling.
The contract is specific enough to guide future tooling.

next_steps: Define the exact Markdown-to-database mapping before adding Supabase integration.
Create the first real approved song Markdown file once extraction artifacts exist.
